minimum_buy: 1 sheet at least 700 x 400 mm; nearest stock size 600 x 600 or 1000 x 500 acceptable
primary_use: Battery tray deck 315 x 265, front/radiator service cassette flat face 325 x 120, hold-down 315 x 38, small tabs/guards
notes: Do not try to make the deck or component mounting faces from angle only.

minimum_buy: 25 x 25 x 3 mm or 30 x 30 x 3 mm; 3 m total
primary_use: Battery tray perimeter/upstands; front service cassette frame; shallow top-front shelf rails; cable/P-clip tabs
notes: Use straight stock with clean legs; mitre ends rather than making long folded channels from sheet.

minimum_buy: 1 plate at least 700 x 450 mm; nearest stock size 1000 x 500 acceptable
primary_use: Chassis saddle flat pattern; flat bolt tabs; upright/gusset plates if angle route needs flat interfaces; first-article trial coupons
notes: Still needed even with angle stock because the chassis saddle and bolt faces need measured flat geometry.

minimum_buy: 50 x 50 x 4 mm angle; 1 m length
primary_use: Radiator two-side retention post with 48-50 mm measured main face and 618 mm developed main-face route
notes: If 50 x 50 x 4 is unavailable use the nearest 4 mm angle with one leg close to 48-50 mm; otherwise form from plate.

minimum_buy: 40 x 40 x 4 mm angle; 2 m length
primary_use: Battery stand upright bridge members; stand frame trials; structural corner braces
notes: Use only where dry-fit keeps bolt access and battery/electrical service clear; flat plates still control chassis pickup faces.

material: mild-steel tube/sleeve stock for crush tubes
minimum_buy: 300 mm shop offcut; ID to final M8/M10 through-bolt size after dry-fit
primary_use: Chassis/front-support through-bolt sleeves or spacers if bolting through boxed structure
notes: Do not buy final ID/OD until the through-bolt size and boxed-section wall spacing are confirmed.

minimum_buy: 250 x 350 mm minimum; 500 x 500 mm if optional relay/electrical fallback prototypes are also cut
primary_use: MIDI Rev C mount plate; folded cutoff base/guard; optional fallback relay/electrical carriers
notes: Use aluminium only for electrical component carriers/guards, not for the battery stand structure.

minimum_buy: 1 sheet about 1000 x 1000 mm or nearest manageable body-panel sheet size
primary_use: Tub skin/floor/firewall lip/small closure patch allowance
notes: Keep away from battery/radiator fabrication stock.

minimum_buy: 1 sheet about 1000 x 500 mm or nearest manageable body-panel sheet size
notes: Use where original tub sheet is heavier than skin panels.

minimum_buy: 1 plate about 500 x 500 mm or 300 x 600 mm
primary_use: Tub body-mount backing plates; captive-nut/weld-nut repair plates; reinforcement coupons
notes: Release final shapes only after each mount station is cleaned and measured.
